name: Undead
description: This creature does not breathe, is immune to poison and disease, and is unaffected by the Bleeding Condition. It never gains Fatigued from sleep deprivation.

name: Fearless
description: Automatically passes Fear Tests related to a specified subject, and never gains the Frightened Condition from that subject.

name: Rover
description: Used to a life on the road; gains bonuses to Stealth and Survival tests in the wilderness.

name: Menacing
description: Imposing presence grants bonuses to Intimidate Tests.

name: Warrior Born
description: Raised for battle; gains bonuses to Melee Tests in their favoured weapon group.

name: Implacable
description: Never gives up the chase once prey is marked; gains bonuses when pursuing foes.
